name: Petal in the Wind

granted_abilities.name: Shadow Behind the Fan
granted_abilities.text: For each raise this model's attack actions receive, a friendly model within 3" of this model gains a Focused token.

granted_actions.name: Compose the Scene
granted_actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Then, this model may make a Scheme marker within 1".

extraction_notes: The limitations line shows a dash/hyphen, indicating no limitations apply.
Action icons: Two circles before 'Compose the Scene' indicate a double tactical action.
The action has Skill 0, which is explicitly shown in the Skl column.
